title: OCS/GCS qconf project schema
description: Schema describing the JSON produced and consumed by qconf -fmt json -sprj / -Mprj: a project definition.

oticket.description: Override tickets assigned to the project.

fshare.description: Functional share assigned to the project.

acl.description: Access lists granting access to the project.

xacl.description: Access lists denying access to the project.
